question: 2015 is coming in 36 hours. What is the date one week from today in MM/DD/YYYY?
chain_of_thought: If 2015 is coming in 36 hours, then it is coming in 2 days. 2 days before 01/01/2015 is 12/30/2014, so today is 12/30/2014. So one week from today will be 01/05/2015.

question: The first day of 2019 is a Tuesday, and today is the first Monday of 2019. What is the date today in MM/DD/YYYY?
chain_of_thought: If the first day of 2019 was Tuesday, then 01/01/2019 was a Tuesday. Today is the first monday, would be six days later. So today is 01/07/2019.

question: The concert was scheduled to be on 06/01/1943, but was delayed by one day to today. What is the date 10 days ago in MM/DD/YYYY?
chain_of_thought: One day after 06/01/1943 is 06/02/1943, so today is 06/02/1943. 10 days before today is 05/23/1943.

question: It is 4/19/1969 today. What is the date 24 hours later in MM/DD/YYYY?
chain_of_thought: Today is 04/19/1969. 24 hours later is one day after today, which would be 04/20/1969.

question: Jane thought today is 3/11/2002, but today is in fact Mar 12, which is 1 day later. What is the date 24 hours later in MM/DD/YYYY?
chain_of_thought: Today is 03/12/2002. So the date 24 hours later will be 03/13/2002.

question: Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Today is her 16-year-old birthday. What is the date yesterday in MM/DD/YYYY?
chain_of_thought: The last day of February is the 28th, so Jane was born on 02/28/2001. Today is her 16-year old birthday, so today is 02/28/2017. So yesterday was 02/27/2017.
